title: DeepSeek-R1: Incentivizing Reasoning via Reinforcement Learning
description: Trains LLMs to reason purely via RL without SFT cold start, achieving o1-level performance.

title: JEPA: Self-Supervised Learning via Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture
description: LeCun's proposed architecture for world models that reasons in abstract representation space.

title: FlashAttention-3: Fast Attention for H100 GPUs
description: Leverages H100 hardware features (TMA, WGMMA) to push attention throughput to near-theoretical limits.

title: Scaling Laws for Neural Language Models
description: Empirical laws relating model performance to compute, data, and parameters — the blueprint for GPT-4.

title: RT-2: Vision-Language-Action Models
description: Co-fine-tunes a VLM on robot data so the same model reasons about scenes and outputs robot actions.

title: DreamerV3: Mastering Diverse Domains with World Models
description: A single algorithm that masters Atari, continuous control, and Minecraft from scratch using a learned world model.

title: Segment Anything Model 2 (SAM 2)
description: Extends SAM to video, enabling promptable, real-time segmentation of any object in any video.

title: Constitutional AI: Harmlessness from AI Feedback
description: Trains harmless AI using AI-generated feedback rather than human labeling, using a Constitutional set of principles.

title: Voyager: An Open-Ended Embodied Agent with LLMs
description: Lifelong learning agent in Minecraft that writes its own code to solve tasks, building a skill library over time.

title: Toolformer: Language Models That Can Use Tools
description: Self-supervised method to teach LLMs when and how to call external APIs (calculator, search, calendar).

title: Mechanistic Interpretability of Neural Networks
description: Reverse-engineering neural networks to understand circuits, features, and internal representations.

title: RLHF: Training Language Models to Follow Instructions with Human Feedback
description: InstructGPT — the paper that made GPT-3 follow instructions by fine-tuning with PPO on human preferences.

title: LLaMA 3: Open Foundation and Fine-Tuned Chat Models
description: Meta's fully open LLaMA 3 family — from 8B to 405B, with details on pretraining data, architecture, and alignment.

title: Gemini 1.5: Unlocking Multimodal Understanding Across Millions of Tokens
description: Google's Gemini 1.5 with a 1M token context window — how mixture-of-experts enables efficient long-context processing.

title: Mixture of Experts: Switch Transformer
description: Scales language models to trillion parameters with sparse Mixture-of-Experts, replacing dense FFN layers.

title: Stable Diffusion: High-Resolution Image Synthesis with Latent Diffusion
description: Moves diffusion process into a compressed latent space, enabling high-quality image synthesis on consumer hardware.

title: CLIP: Learning Transferable Visual Models From Natural Language Supervision
description: Learns image-text representations from 400M pairs — zero-shot image classification rival to supervised baselines.

title: Graph Neural Networks: A Review of Methods and Applications
description: Comprehensive survey of GNN methods — message passing, pooling, and applications in chemistry, social networks, and NLP.
